name: Big Fig
tagline: Purpose-built mattress for plus-size sleepers — no compromises
description: Big Fig is the first mattress specifically designed and engineered for heavier individuals (up to 1,100 lbs per couple). Unlike standard mattresses that sag under heavy weight, the Big Fig uses a reinforced hybrid construction with high-density foams, a 50% stronger coil system, and a firm feel to maintain spinal alignment and durability for years. It features a ThermoGel cooling layer and a never-sag foundation for ultimate peace of mind.
features: High-density foam layers (up to 3× standard density)
cons: Very firm — not for plush lovers
seoTitle: Big Fig Mattress 2026: Best Heavy-Duty Mattress for Plus-Size Sleepers?
seoDescription: Big Fig is built for heavier bodies — 1,100 lb capacity. No sagging, no compromise. See why plus-size sleepers love this mattress!
